name: Joanne Hoar
title: Technology Educator, Software Developer, Game Developer
summary: Canadian Software Developer with 20 years of experience in video game programming, scientific modelling and cross-platform development. Expertise in multiple programming languages, game engines and SDKs. Proven track record in leading teams, mentoring developers, impressing customers and building corporate culture. Strong background in C++, Unreal Engine, iOS and Android using agile methodologies and CI/CD. Passion for algorithmic correctness, mathematics, artificial intelligence and nature.

experience.title: Technology Instructor
experience.description: Instructed 20+ course offerings across Full Stack Development and Data Analytics diploma programs. Delivered live coding sessions, maintained open-source course materials on GitHub, and achieved an average student satisfaction rating of 4.5/5.0.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained cross-platform client SDKs for a backend-as-a-service platform used by 50+ published games across 12 platforms including PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, iOS, and Android. Engineered CI/CD and TDD pipelines and managed customer relationships with AAA and Indie studios.

experience.title: Co-founder/ Lead Developer
experience.description: Designed, coded and published eleven mobile games for iOS and Android, from concept and game design through to commercial app-store release. Experimented with cutting-edge device technologies including ARKit and other emerging SDKs.

experience.title: Tools Programmer
experience.description: Developed tools that used mathematical modelling to maximize production and improve efficiency for major oil & gas corporations. Led research on a new system that reduced build times by 40%.

experience.title: Intermediate Software Engineer
experience.company: BJ Pipeline Inspection Services Inc. (Baker Hughes)
experience.description: Visualised in-line device data with OpenGL graphics. Implemented neural network algorithms for anomaly detection. Led development of custom web-based GIS reporting software. Improved low-level programming algorithms for data processing.

experience.title: Co-founder / App Developer / Instructor
experience.description: Created and published physics-based games for iOS. Handled technical writing, web development, Google Maps and Firebase integration and server administration. Developed course curriculum, instructed C++ programming and assessed student work with the Department of Continuing Education.

experience.title: Software Researcher / Lead Developer
experience.description: Led development and system administration for an iTunes-like music store. Automated DRM encoding and video streaming. Developed a prototype for a Google-competitive search engine.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
experience.description: Ported applications to operate under a new GUI library. Developed user interfaces for software lifecycle automation.

experience.title: Web Developer / VR Artist
experience.company: Nickle Arts Museum, University of Calgary (contract)
experience.description: Designed and developed an interactive online catalogue for the Gerald Hushlak art exhibit with JavaScript-based features. Contributed original generative art from graduate research. Collaborated on a pioneering VR installation using 3D scanning and CAVE immersion technology.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.company: VLab Computer Graphics Group / Artificial Intelligence Research Hub
experience.description: Developed graphics software tools using fractal mathematics and biological modelling. Managed network setup and distributed computing infrastructure. Published five research papers and served as teaching assistant across three courses.

education.thesis: Agent-based Development of Natural Transportation Networks

awards.title: Departmental Nomination: Governor General's Gold Medal
Postgraduate Scholarship NSERC D3
awards.organization: Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council of Canada
